did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a pipeline for transforming routine teledermatology data into metadata-embedded DICOM files to make them 'AI-ready' for future use. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain the study results; instead, it uses automated software processes (pydicom, DICOM standards) for data standardization and metadata embedding. The authors explicitly state that future work is planned to evaluate the utility of this output on AI classifiers, indicating AI was not used in the current study's methodology or results generation.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
